name: Platform Administrator
description: Full access to all modules and options in SynapxIA, including configuration, security and operational capabilities.

name: Operational Administrator
description: Administrative role with full edit access to collaboration, Generative AI, AI initiatives, metrics, processes and digital assets, but without platform-level administration features.

name: Standard Collaborator
description: Operational user with read access to collaboration, Generative AI, AI initiatives, processes and digital assets, and edit rights only for AI initiative proposals.
